working_on.task: Connect marquee logos to Experiences dictionary
working_on.notes: Marquee now dynamically pulls logos and names from dict.companies.

recent_changes.description: Connected the marquee section at the bottom of Experiences to the companies database in CMS, removing hardcoded placeholder LOGO items.
Completed Experiences Master-Detail layout with website links.
Completed Projects Grid and Modal Popup.
Completed Skills Accordion and Detail pane.

errors_encountered.error: TypeScript error with framer-motion ease type
errors_encountered.solution: Added 'as const' to the ease string.

decisions_made.decision: Use raw SVGs for missing Lucide icons
decisions_made.reason: Faster, no external dependency required, visually consistent.
Client requested to use vertical photos of referrers.
